title: CommonsV2 Group A: velocity reconciliation + move sequencing

log.context: CommonsV2 Group A: velocity reconciliation + move sequencing

Both fixes are committed and pushed. Summary of what was done:

---

**Fix 1 — `commons-v2/src/entities/local-player.ts`, `reconcile()` function:**

Added a block after the snap/smooth correction logic: when `errDist > 2` (position corrected by more than 2px), `player.pendingInputs` is cleared. Since movement in this codebase is purely input-driven (no explicit `vx`/`vy` fields), clearing pending inputs is the equivalent of zeroing velocity — it prevents the pending input replay from immediately...(truncated)
